title: Senior Financial Analyst - L&T Finance Capital India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - L&T Finance Capital India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, L&T Finance Capital India in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About L&T Finance Capital India:
L&T Finance Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance Capital India!
